expectations.evidence: Uses vulnerability__get_cves. Does not invoke vulnerability__get_system_cves.

Does NOT use the 'impact' parameter. The old skills document 'severity' which does not exist in the MCP tool schema. The agent omits severity (per multi-severity strategy) but also does not use 'impact' to filter by severity level.
Uses affecting=true which is NOT a valid MCP parameter (actual param is advisory_available). The old skills document 'affecting (true/false)' but the MCP schema has no such parameter.
Uses 'affecting=true' instead of advisory_available='true'. The 'affecting' parameter does not exist in the MCP tool schema.
